SKILLS
Margin of Failure used as positive modifier t0 increase the Forgery Skill Check" Characters who lack a appropriate Career Skill or Specia Interest must make an untrained Action Check, so their forgeries are unlikely to be convincing
nose mounts opposed turrets and emplacements; Includes aerospace and conventional fighters, VTOLS, aerodyne DropShips and other aerodyne spacecraft. Conventional (Conv): This category includes all conven tional ground and naval vehicles (except VTOLs) . including stat ic emplacements Humanoid: This category represents weapons built-in on humanoid body; which includes BattleMechs and battle armor: Space= This category includes spacecraft that fire theii weapons from turrets and emplacements as opposed t0 fixec mounts includes JumpShips WarShips and spheroic DropShips_
FREE FALL This skill is used to safely steer and land in ay free fall situation, including parachuting and Battlel Mecn combat drops_ Modifiers should be applied to the roll for lighting conditions as well as conditions of the area to be landed in (use this skill in place of  Piloting when using the   Dropping Troops rules Battle Tech Master Rules 72). successful Skill    Check results in an on-target landing with no injury: Failure results in off-target landing and damage as trom fall from number of meters equal to the Margin of Failure see Falling; 120).
Gunnery / Ballistic This subskill is used for direct-fire weapons that inflict theil damage using bullet or shell_ including autocannons gauss rifles and machine guns Tube artillery uses the Artillery Skill; not this subskill:
GAMBLING The Gambling Skill gives character working knowledge of games of chance and helps him cheat or detect cheating tnem; successful Gambling Action Check enables character to cheat during such game. However, each time the character attempts to cheat again during the same game, he must repeat the roll, increasing the target number by each time failed roll means the character has been caught in the act: cheating character may also be exposed another character makes an Opposed Test using his own Gambling Skill against the cheater and achieves higher Margin of Success. The Gambling Skill can also be used t0 determine char- acter'$ success in games of chance. Though roleplaying such games may be more fun, Gambling Action Check can be used instead quickly determine character' $ success such games high Margin of Success indicates large winnings while high Margin of Failure indicates large losses; as rule 0f thumb multiply the character' $ Margin of Success (or Failure) by 10 to find the percent of the starting stake won (or lost):
Gunnery / Laser This subskill iS used for direct-fire weapons that use lasers, flames or charged particles to damage their target by heating it, including all kinds of lasers_ particle projection cannons and flamers
Gunnery / Missile This subskill iS used for all kinds of missile launchers_ they direct indirect fire including long , medium: ad short: range missiles as well as variant missile launchers such streak SRMs and the Clan advanced tactical missile system: Missile artillery uses the Artillery Skill, not this subskill.
GUNSMITH Tnis skill covers the manufacture maintenance and repair of personal weapons On his Own character can reload and perform basic maintenance on any kind of personal weapon: Combined with the appropriate Technician Subskill (p. 1071, this skill can be used t0 build and repair weapons
GUNNERY" This skill covers the use of vehicle-mounted heavy weapons such as those carried by BattleMechs (for other heavy weapons use the Support Weapons Skill, 106). Artillery weapons are not used with this skill; even if they are mounted on vehicle; the Artillery Skill used instead (see 96). The Gunnery Skill has three subskills based weapon types and is also divided into four categories based on the way the weapon is mounted: character must pecify both the sub skill and   category eacn his Gunnery Skills such Gunnery / Laser / Humanoid or Gunnery/Missile / Aero. character may use Gunnery Subskill with category in which he has no skill by rolling 3010 ad using the worst two results as per the Untrained Skill Use rule (p_ 16), but he can apply his   Gunnery Skill Bonus rather than Untrained Use Modifiers for Attributes_ AeroSpace (Aero): This category includes space and atmospheric craft that fire their weapons from fixed wing ad
INTERESTS" This group of subskills covers all miscellaneous interests and  hobbies that are not   covered other skills, sucn a5 holovid shows Solaris duelists and various sports Like Career Skills the potential Iist of Interests is infinite_
INTERROGATION character with Interrogation Skill can attempt to obtain information from any unwilling NPC_ making Skill Check to determine whether he IS able t0 extract the desired information: This Skill differs from Fast Talk in that the interrogation process takes more time and can extract far more information_ The tar get number for an Interrogation Check based on the subject'$ INT and WIL unless torture is being used in which case the tar
